title: GAMBLERS ANONYMOUS - 211info
text: GAMBLERS ANONYMOUS GAMBLERS ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about 12-step support groups and other resources related to the topic of problem gambling. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (855) 222-5542 855-2 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (855) 222-5542 855-2CALLGA Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Gambling Addiction Support Groups Gambling Disorder Helplines If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
